requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly, every bank which is part of a group, shall
implement group-wide programmes against money laundering and terror
financing, including group-wide policies for sharing information required for the
purposes of client due diligence, money laundering, and terrorist finance risk
management, and such programmes shall include adequate safeguards on the
confidentiality and use of information exchanged, including safeguards to prevent
tipping-off.

requirements.full_sentence:
Bank's policy framework shall seek to ensure compliance with PML Act / Rules,
including regulatory instructions in this regard and shall provide a bulwark against
threats arising from money laundering, terrorist financing, proliferation financing
and other related risks.

managing risks better.
requirements.object: best international practices taking into account the FATF standards and FATF guidance notes, for managing risks better

requirements.full_sentence:
Money Laundering and Terrorist Financing Risk Assessment by the bank:
(1) The bank shall carry out 'Money Laundering (ML) and Terrorist Financing
(TF) Risk Assessment' exercises periodically to identify, assess and take
effective measures to mitigate its money laundering and terrorist financing
risk for clients, countries or geographic areas, products, services,
transactions or delivery channels, etc.
requirements.object: (ML) and Terrorist Financing (TF) Risk Assessment' exercises periodically to identify, assess and take effective measures

requirements.full_sentence:
The assessment process shall consider all the relevant risk factors before
determining the level of overall risk and the appropriate level and type of
mitigation to be applied.
requirements.object: risk factors before determining the level of overall risk and the appropriate level and type of mitigation to be applied

requirements.full_sentence:
While preparing the internal risk assessment, the
bank shall take cognizance of the overall sector-specific vulnerabilities, if
any, that the regulator / supervisor may share with the bank from time to
time.
requirements.object: overall sector-specific vulnerabilities

requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The bank shall properly document its risk assessment and it shall be
proportionate to the nature, size, geographical presence, complexity of
activities / structure, etc.

requirements.full_sentence: However, the bank shall review it at least annually.
requirements.object: annually

requirements.full_sentence:

requirements.object: to competent authorities and self-regulating bodies

/ services, types of transactions undertaken such as cash, cheque /
